paper.title: The Hidden Footprint: Making Storage a First-Class Metric for LLM Agent Evaluation
paper.withdrawal_status: The immutable v1 arXiv API summary contains no withdrawal or retraction notice.

official_release.relationship_to_paper: The pinned commit predates immutable arXiv v1 publication by approximately two days and is the default-branch head acquired on 2026-07-15. Its broad contents match the paper's Appendix A description at an inventory level, but timing and inventory do not establish byte identity with the authors' private experiment environment. Detailed release-to-paper correspondence remains for the queued deep review.

acquisition_scope: Downloaded the immutable arXiv v1 PDF, extracted layout-preserving full text, verified title/byline/version/page count and readable coverage from abstract through the final supplementary figure, pinned the official repository, archived its complete default-branch snapshot, passed ZIP integrity validation, and spot-checked the released documentation, environment locks, calibration data, run records, and continuous-store report. This is source acquisition and extraction, not a deep review or reproduction of reported results.
local_storage_note: The PDF and release ZIP are intentionally ignored local evidence; the extracted paper text, paper-index entry, and this provenance record are versioned. Re-fetch ignored artifacts from the immutable/pinned URLs above and verify SHA-256 when absent locally.
